policy.exit_criteria: Every registered source site is replaced by a reviewed class, SVG geometry contract, native element contract, or another representation compatible with style-src-attr 'none'.

exceptions.reason: Build progress width is rendered from the typed i32 BuildJob.progress field.
exceptions.constraints: The value is numeric transport data and the source site may set only width in percent; it must not accept a CSS string.
exceptions.exit_criteria: Replace the width attribute with a reviewed native progress or finite class contract that remains functional under style-src-attr 'none'.

exceptions.reason: Category cards expose a persisted visual accent.
exceptions.constraints: Category colors are rejected before persistence unless they match the strict hex grammar, then normalized again at the JSON model boundary before this source site is rendered.
exceptions.exit_criteria: Replace arbitrary category accents with the shared reviewed finite palette class already used by the storefront.

exceptions.reason: The authoring iframe supports custom viewport dimensions and continuous zoom from typed editor state.
exceptions.constraints: The two source sites emit only numeric width, height and normalized zoom values; overlay and resize geometry no longer use CSS text.
exceptions.exit_criteria: Replace iframe sizing and zoom with a reviewed CSP-compatible viewport adapter while preserving custom viewport support.
